title: Age of Piracy
description: Assemble your crew and sail the high seas! Explore, kill, plunder!
body:
**Take to the seas in this new pirate-themed modpack! Build your ship and sail using Valkyrien Skies, attack other vessels from Valkyrien Pirates, and plunder the towns and cities of various structure mods.**



Inlcudes:
- Fish mods
- Performance mods
- Structure mods
- Valyrien skies and Eurika Airships
- Valkyrien Pirates
- Better combat, combat roll, dash, archers (rpg series)
- Weapon mods
- Aquamirae
- Tectonic and Terralith
- Lots of visual mods
- Others
- PillagerToPirate resource pack from [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/pillagertopirate)
